emails.subject: Storage Report Request
emails.body:
Hi Alice,

I'm putting together our quarterly resource allocation review and I need your help. Could you generate a storage report showing how much space each of our project directories is using in the shared workspace?

I need to see the size breakdown for all the subdirectories - project_alpha, project_beta, the data folder, logs, archives, etc. Please save the report somewhere in the workspace so I can reference it later.

Would be great if you could post a quick summary to the project-updates channel when it's done so the whole team knows it's available.

Thanks!
Bob
